base_url.description: Rocket.Chat server base URL (e.g. https://chat.example.com). The /api/v1 suffix is appended automatically if not already present.

auth_token.description: Rocket.Chat personal access token, sent as the X-Auth-Token header. Never logged.

user_id.description: Rocket.Chat user id paired with auth_token, sent as the X-User-Id header. Never logged.

query.description: Optional raw Rocket.Chat query-string filter passed through to list endpoints as the 'query' parameter.

fields.description: Optional Rocket.Chat field-projection filter passed through as the 'fields' parameter.

room_id.description: Optional room id filter passed through as the 'roomId' parameter (used by the rooms stream).

updated_since.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp passed through as the 'updatedSince' parameter (used by the rooms stream).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
